name: TaskFlow Desktop
summary: A desktop task manager for personal productivity built with C#, WPF, and MVVM.
highlights: Implemented task creation, filtering, and due-date reminders
Persisted user data locally with SQLite
Structured the UI around the MVVM pattern

name: Galaxy Courier
summary: A 2D Unity prototype game focused on movement, UI feedback, and save state handling.
highlights: Built player movement and level progression systems
Added a lightweight settings and progress save feature
Used Git for version control across project milestones

name: Student API Demo
summary: A beginner-friendly backend demo showing CRUD operations with ASP.NET Core and EF Core.
highlights: Created CRUD endpoints for student records
Connected application data to a relational database
Tested endpoints locally with HTTP client tools
